ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Primary source of water for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "growth_type" TEXT /* Type of growth (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "optimal_temperature" REAL /* Optimal temperature for plant growth */,
  "optimal_humidity" REAL /* Optimal humidity for plant growth */,
  "optimal_lighting" TEXT /* Optimal lighting conditions for plant growth */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Typical lifespan of the plant in years */,
  "soil_pH" REAL /* Optimal soil pH for the plant */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* A list of diseases the plant is resistant to */,
  "pest_resistance" TEXT /* A list of pests the plant is resistant to */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* Water requirements of the plant */,
  "fertilizer_requirements" TEXT /* Fertilizer requirements of the plant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_growth_type FOREIGN KEY ("growth_type") REFERENCES plant_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_growth_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth cycle */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the growth cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the growth cycle */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Growth conditions (e.g., Very Hot, Light Hot) */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level during the growth cycle */,
  "air_quality" TEXT /* Air quality during the growth cycle */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Average number of sunlight hours per day during the growth cycle */,
  "watering_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of watering during the growth cycle */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used during the growth cycle */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used to harvest the plant */,
  "harvest_yield" INTEGER /* Expected yield of the harvest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the growth cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_cycles_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_cycles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_cycles_growth_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("growth_conditions") REFERENCES plant_growth_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gardeners" (
  "gardener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gardener */,
  "gardener_name" TEXT /* Name of the gardener */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the gardener */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the gardener is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the gardener (e.g., Manager, Gardener) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the gardener */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the gardener was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the gardener (e.g., herbs, vegetables) */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* A list of training programs completed by the gardener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gardener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gardeners_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the gardener the task is assigned to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the task is associated with */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the task in hours */,
  "actual_time" REAL /* Actual time taken to complete the task in hours */,
  "materials_required" TEXT /* A list of materials required for the task */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* A list of equipment required for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES gardeners ("gardener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_growth_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth condition */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures for the condition */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Range of humidity for the condition */,
  "lighting_range" TEXT /* Range of lighting conditions for the condition */,
  "soil_moisture_range" TEXT /* Range of soil moisture for the condition */,
  "air_quality_range" TEXT /* Range of air quality for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant type */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Typical growth period of the plant type */,
  "propagation_method" TEXT /* Method of propagation (e.g., seeds, cuttings) */,
  "maintenance_level" TEXT /* Level of maintenance required (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth cycle */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made by the gardener */,
  "gardener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gardener who made the observation */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level at the time of observation */,
  "air_quality" TEXT /* Air quality at the time of observation */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Number of sunlight hours at the time of observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_observations_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES plant_growth_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_observations_gardener_id FOREIGN KEY ("gardener_id") REFERENCES gardeners ("gardener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_harvests" (
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harvest */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth cycle */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the harvest */,
  "harvest_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the harvest */,
  "harvest_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the harvest */,
  "gardener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gardener who performed the harvest */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used to harvest the plant */,
  "harvest_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the harvest (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "harvest_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the garden where the harvest took place */,
  "harvest_technique" TEXT /* Technique used for harvesting */,
  "harvest_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for harvesting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harvest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_harvests_gardener_id FOREIGN KEY ("gardener_id") REFERENCES gardeners ("gardener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_harvests_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES plant_growth_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth cycle */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., Watering, Pruning) */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the maintenance activity */,
  "gardener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gardener who performed the maintenance */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* A list of materials used during the maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* A list of equipment used during the maintenance activity */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent on the maintenance activity in hours */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level at the time of maintenance */,
  "air_quality" TEXT /* Air quality at the time of maintenance */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Number of sunlight hours at the time of maintenance */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of maintenance */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_maintenance_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES plant_growth_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_maintenance_gardener_id FOREIGN KEY ("gardener_id") REFERENCES gardeners ("gardener_id")
)
